name: casper
description: Casper — mobile-first AI chat over kiro-cli ACP

scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm:dev:server" "npm:dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @casper/server && npm run build --workspace @casper/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
